subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of him who hath turned to the Divine Countenance, even as We mentioned those who cast aside vain imaginings and set their faces toward the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الوجه کما ذکرنا الذین نبذوا الاوهام و توجهوا الی افق
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @spiritual transformation, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
